title: Inspect migration-related database lock waits
safe_investigation_steps: Confirm whether a migration or schema-changing operation began before the service degradation.
Inspect database lock-wait evidence and identify whether affected writes are waiting on a conflicting transaction.
Compare database write latency, active connection count, and application error rate over the same interval.
Confirm whether consumer processes remain healthy before treating a queue backlog as a consumer-capacity failure.
Record the smallest unknown verification facts before treating this precedent as applicable.
unsafe_or_out_of_scope_actions: Do not terminate database sessions, cancel migrations, or change lock settings from this evidence packet.
Do not treat migration timing as proof that the migration caused the current incident.
Do not surface this procedure as applicable when migration lock waits are unverified.
